blurb_en:
Amazon MGM Studios dropped Luca Guadagnino's 'Artificial' — a nearly finished drama about Sam Altman's firing from OpenAI — four months after Amazon wrote OpenAI a $50 billion check.
- The film stars Andrew Garfield as Altman, Monica Barbaro as Mira Murati, and Ike Barinholtz as Elon Musk.
- Test screenings went positively. Potential buyers screened the film. Nobody bought it.
- Netflix and Focus Features both passed. A24 screened it but has not committed.
- Amazon's official statement: 'We believe Artificial will be better served if released by a different studio.'
- That is not a creative disagreement. That is a press release written by lawyers for a $50 billion reason.
- Note for anyone making content about tech companies: the distributor's investment portfolio is now part of the script.
blurb_zh:
亚马逊MGM制片公司放弃了导演卢卡·瓜达尼诺几乎完成的影片《人工》——一部聚焦山姆·奥特曼2023年被解雇与复职的剧情片——此时距亚马逊向OpenAI投资500亿美元仅过去四个月。
• 影片主演安德鲁·加菲尔德饰奥特曼，莫妮卡·巴尔瓦罗饰穆拉蒂，艾克·巴林霍尔兹饰马斯克。
• 试映反馈不错。潜在买家看过影片。没有人出手。
• Netflix和Focus Features均已婉拒。A24看过样片，尚未表态。
• 亚马逊官方声明：「我们相信《人工》由其他制片公司发行会更合适。」
• 这不是创作分歧。这是律师为一笔500亿美元的生意写的公关稿。
• 给所有做内容的人提个醒：发行方的投资组合现在也是剧本的一部分。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Variety (June 19), Hollywood Reporter (June 19), TheWrap, TMZ (June 19), TheNextWeb, Kotaku. Amazon statement confirmed. Netflix and Focus Features passes confirmed via Hollywood Reporter follow-up.

blurb_en:
China's government is drafting a $295 billion, five-year plan to build a nationwide AI data center network — operated by state firms China Mobile and China Telecom, and structured to source at least 80% of technology from domestic suppliers.
• 80% domestic means Huawei chips instead of Nvidia. The plan is explicitly designed to eliminate the dependency that US export controls were intended to create.
• Including power-grid integration could raise total investment to 5 trillion yuan — roughly $700 billion.
• The US private sector is spending $725 billion on AI infrastructure in 2026 alone; the Chinese plan is building toward that benchmark using public capital instead of private.
• China's sovereign AI compute stack is state-directed; America's is market-driven and concentrated in four companies. Both are accelerating.
• Imaging hardware and software companies operating in China will be building on this infrastructure whether they opted in or not.
blurb_zh:
中国政府正在起草一份总额约2.1万亿元（2950亿美元）的五年计划，旨在构建由中国移动、中国电信等国有企业运营的全国AI数据中心网络，并要求至少80%的技术来自国内供应商。
• 80%国产化意味着用华为芯片替代英伟达——这一设计明确针对美国出口管制所造成的依赖。
• 若计入电网整合，总投资可能超过5万亿元。
• 2026年美国私营企业仅AI基础设施支出就达7250亿美元；中国计划以国家资本向这一规模追赶。
• 中国的主权AI算力体系由国家主导，美国则交给市场——集中在四家公司手中。两条路都在加速。
• 在中国经营的影像硬件和软件企业，不管愿不愿意，都将运行在这套基础设施之上。
verification_notes: Bloomberg June 9 2026 primary report. Confirmed via The Spokesman-Review, The Edge Singapore, The Next Web, Yahoo Finance, and carboncredits.com. $295B figure, NDRC role, China Mobile/Telecom operators, and 80% domestic supplier requirement all cross-verified.

blurb_en:
Midjourney added Draft Mode to V8.1 on June 16 — each prompt now generates 24 images at once at lower resolution, and a single click renders any of them at full 2K quality.
• 24 draft images per prompt, at 512x512 pixels, cost 0.4 GPU minutes total — half the cost of a single standard V8.1 job.
• A --preview flag lets users test the aesthetic direction of V8.2 before it ships.
• V8.2 has been in development for at least three months. The --preview flag is the first concrete look at where it's going.
• For high-volume visual work — product shoots, moodboards, concept exploration — Draft Mode is effectively a contact sheet. It's the workflow feature the platform needed.
blurb_zh:
Midjourney于6月16日在V8.1版本中上线了草稿模式——每条提示一次生成24张低分辨率图片，点击任意一张即可渲染至完整2K质量。
• 24张草稿图分辨率512x512像素，总计消耗0.4分钟GPU算力——仅为单张标准V8.1任务成本的一半。
• --preview参数可预览尚在开发中的V8.2版本的视觉风格走向。
• V8.2已在开发中至少三个月。--preview是迄今最具体的一瞥。
• 对于大批量视觉创作——产品拍摄、情绪板、风格探索——草稿模式本质上就是一张联系表。这是这个平台一直需要的工作流功能。
verification_notes: Confirmed via Midjourney official updates page. June 16 date confirmed via geekycuriosity.substack.com analysis and Midjourney docs. 24 images per draft, 512x512px, 0.4 GPU minutes, half fast-hours cost, --preview parameter all confirmed.
